headline: Clear calendar and no inbound messages — use today to drive deep progress on the two open Evals UX tickets before the next bi-weekly review cycle.

must_make_progress.why: Major priority, In Progress — no due date but this is a key 26.4+ deliverable area (Evals) tied to the Agents Big Rock; empty calendar = ideal deep-work day

Align on whether 'no ground truth' generated evaluations (AE-1079) intersects with validation patterns or DeepRAG work

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility on customer escalations. Fix or escalate to IT today.
Snowflake integration is down (empty password) — no product telemetry or funnel metrics available. This is critical for the next bi-weekly TR.
Both JIRA tickets have no due dates set — consider adding target dates to signal urgency to the team.
No Slack activity in 16h — unusually quiet; verify Slack integration is working correctly.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring visibility into escalations and metrics while advancing the Evals UX work that supports the 26.4+ Agents Big Rock.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing AE-744 and AE-1079 will directly improve the evaluator experience driving adoption.

slack_summary: Zero meetings today — ideal deep-work day to push AE-744 (Evals UX for justification + actual vs expected) and draft the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079). Urgent: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and product metrics — get credentials fixed. No meetings on the calendar today.
